Command-line obfuscation tool for compiled .NET assemblies. Provides compatibility-aware IL protection with string encryption, safe rename for eligible private/internal members, decoy type injection, control-flow hardening, runtime guards, and rename-map output for stack-trace deobfuscation.
Run a command repeatedly and display output on a refreshing screen. A cross-platform 'watch' + 'entr' replacement.

Time a command — wall clock, CPU time, peak memory, exit code. A cross-platform 'time' replacement.
